nodes.name: ⏰ Every 4 Hours
nodes.notes:
Runs every 4 hours (6 times/day).
More frequent = faster engagement responses = higher reply rates.
Adjust to every 2h during growth phase.

nodes.name: ▶️ YT – Get Comments
nodes.notes:
Fetches the 25 most recent comments across all videos on your channel.
Requires youtube.force-ssl scope for comment management.

nodes.name: 📸 IG – Get Comments
nodes.notes:
Fetches comments from the 10 most recent Instagram posts.
Requires instagram_manage_comments scope.

nodes.name: 📋 Merge All Comments
nodes.notes:
Combines YouTube and Instagram comments into a unified list, sorted by time.
Takes the 30 most recent for classification.

values.content:
You are a community manager for a Roblox gaming content creator. Your audience is Gen Z/Alpha (US/Canada). Your tone is witty, playful, and on-brand with gaming culture.

Classify each comment and generate an appropriate response.

For each comment, output:
{
  "id": "comment_id",
  "platform": "YouTube/Instagram",
  "classification": "reply-worthy | ignore | flag-for-human",
  "reason": "brief reason for classification",
  "reply": "your witty reply (empty string if ignore/flag)"
}

Classification rules:
- reply-worthy: genuine questions, compliments, interesting observations, memes, challenges. Reply with wit and gaming energy.
- ignore: generic comments ("first!", single emojis, gibberish), spam links, bot comments
- flag-for-human: hate speech, harassment, threats, controversy, business inquiries, anything sensitive

Output as a JSON array. Be concise — replies should be 1-2 sentences max.

=Classify and generate replies for these {{ $json.total_comments }} comments:

{{ JSON.stringify($json.comments, null, 2) }}

nodes.name: 🧠 Classify & Generate Replies
nodes.notes:
GPT-4o classifies each comment as reply-worthy, ignore, or flag-for-human.
Generates witty, on-brand replies for reply-worthy comments.
Higher temperature (0.8) for personality and humor.

nodes.name: 📋 Parse Classifications
nodes.notes: Separates the classified comments into reply-worthy, flagged, and ignored categories.

nodes.name: 📱 Send Engagement Report
nodes.notes:
HUMAN IN THE LOOP — Sends classified comments and suggested replies to Telegram.
Replies are NOT auto-posted. You review the suggested replies and manually post them,
or once you trust the AI's tone, you can enable auto-posting by adding
HTTP Request nodes after this to POST the replies via each platform's API.
